publications.title: An Ontology-Based System for Detecting and Repairing Road Potholes Through Community Involvement
publications.authors: Kindo A.A., Kalmogo L., Malo S.

publications.title: PLAVIDA, an Annotation Tool for Audio and Video in African Languages
publications.authors: Traoré G.I., Somé B.M.J., Ouédraogo O., Kalmogo L.

publications.title: CBAG: Consensus-Based Alignment Generation for One Health Ontologies

projects.name: Clinical NLP Pipeline — CHA-AIHP
projects.description: End-to-end NLP pipeline extracting structured information from 14,000+ French ICU clinical notes. Achieves 97% accuracy on ICD-10 coding using BioMistral (zero-shot LLM). Includes anonymization (CamemBERT-NER + Piranha), XML segmentation, and a Streamlit demo app. CNIL approved.
projects.metrics: 97% ICD-10 accuracy · 14k+ clinical notes · CNIL approved

projects.name: CBAG — One Health Ontology Alignment
projects.description: Consensus-Based Alignment Generation framework combining 4 matching systems (AML, LogMap, BERTMapLt, Matcha-DL) with LLM validation (Qwen3-8B) and logical repair. Evaluated on 6 OAEI benchmark pairs — best F1 on 5 of 6 pairs. Applied to 25 One Health ontologies.
projects.metrics: Best F1 on 5/6 OAEI pairs · 25 ontologies · WISE 2026 (under review)

projects.name: Face Recognition Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end face recognition system using MTCNN for detection and landmark alignment, FaceNet (InceptionResnet) for embedding generation, and metric learning for identity verification. Includes a Flask REST API and Streamlit demo.
projects.metrics: MTCNN cascade · FaceNet embeddings · REST API

projects.name: Medical GAN & Stable Diffusion
projects.description: Generative AI for synthetic medical image generation. Implements vanilla GAN and DCGAN for X-ray/MRI generation, then uses Stable Diffusion with LoRA fine-tuning for text-to-medical-image synthesis. Includes MedIGAN integration.

projects.name: RAG Computer Advisor — PowerTech
projects.description: Freelance project: AI-powered computer recommendation system using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Users describe their needs and budget — the system retrieves candidates from the product database and uses OpenAI GPT to recommend the best match with explanation.
projects.metrics: Freelance project · Full-stack deployment · RAG pipeline

projects.name: SIR Epidemic Network
projects.description: Temporal SIR epidemic model implemented from scratch on a real high school contact network (188k contacts). Includes network analysis, parameter calibration via grid search (β=0.8, μ=0.002 → 75% outbreak), and class-level risk identification.
projects.metrics: 188k real contacts · 75% outbreak calibration · 2BIO3 highest risk class

projects.name: PLAVIDA — African Language Annotation
projects.description: Mobile platform for annotating audio and video in African local languages. Includes an accessible interface for illiterate users (icon-based UI). Backend deployed on PythonAnywhere. Published at AFRICOMM 2023 (Springer).
projects.metrics: Springer publication · Deployed backend · Illiterate-friendly UI

projects.name: ML From Scratch — Zindi Africa Training
projects.description: Teaching material delivered for the Zindi Africa data science community. Implements Perceptron and multi-layer Neural Network with backpropagation from scratch using NumPy only. Demonstrates XOR problem and gradient descent.
projects.metrics: Zindi Africa community · Neural Network from scratch

projects.name: Master AI4PH Projects
projects.description: Collection of practical notebooks from M2 AI for Public Health (AMU): clinical NLP, diabetes/cancer ML classification, breast cancer clustering, feature selection with SHAP explainability, SIR epidemic model, PubMed pipeline.
projects.metrics: 8+ notebooks · SHAP XAI · Custom ML classes
